---
title: "Luminescent and dosimetric properties of CaSO4:RE,Mn (RE = Dy, Tb, Tm, Yb, Eu, Ce) phosphors synthesized by the slow evaporation method"
date: 2026-03-01
author:
  - name: Silva, Anderson M.B.
  - name: Junot, Danilo O.
  - name: Trindade, Neilo M.
  - name: Souza, Divanizia N.
  - name: Caldas, Linda V.E.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Radiation Measurements"
  volume: 192
  doi: "10.1016/j.radmeas.2026.107624"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Luminescent and dosimetric properties of CaSO4:RE,Mn (RE = Dy, Tb, Tm, Yb, Eu, Ce) phosphors synthesized by the slow evaporation method</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
